prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm wood interior. Yuna Ashbell 005, a feminine frontline adventurer in reinforced leather armor and a bright scarf, steadies a metal shield on a workbench. Yuna Starling, an androgynous healer in cream and mint robes, guides a repair tool over the shield surface. Cooperative hands, warm forge light, cinematic focus, no sparks hitting skin, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous forge shot, same lighting and characters. Yuna Starling taps the final repair mark on the shield with a small tool while Yuna Ashbell 005 holds the shield steady with a confident stance. Friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, consistent character appearance, no text, no watermark.
